coverage: 100% of the reachable node types across the 46-group, 828-node closure.
validation: The browser reproduces the relative three-object structure, welded quad-sphere seed, repeated tight-wrap/dual-mesh deformation, and finalized boolean shell. Structure-preview topology is exact at 8,040 / 9,300. The authored stochastic bubble layout is extracted from Blender and now matches exactly before deformation at 10,272 / 20,480; the finalized browser shell is 4,994 vertices / 10,088 triangles versus Blender's 3,302 vertices / 4,675 polygons (6,608 triangles), with a 0.6464-unit maximum bounds difference. The remaining gap is procedural noise/tight-wrap field sampling and boolean tessellation, not missing bubbles. Missing Budokan and Avenir fonts belong to auxiliary label graphs and are not required by the putty surface.
